MFP_QLFYD_RSDNC_CD 

LABEL: Money Follows Person (MFP) — Qualified Residence Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code indicating the type of qualified residence for an eligible MFP Demonstration participant; most 
recent in the calendar year.

LENGTH: 2
